use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and pages
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and interfaces
Inline text links with button behavior
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Features keyboard accessibility with focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and flexible sizing. Built with Tailwind and class-variance-authority following shadcn/ui design patterns with subtle shadows and rounded corners.
